summary: Iteration 18 — retesting the Messages.jsx bug fix (undefined recipient_id). All 9 previously-passing tests remain green and the formerly-failing TEST_8 now passes. Manager 'New Message' compose form shows a proper 'To:' SELECT dropdown populated from referees (3 options). Sending a message to a selected referee succeeds with a success toast and no Firestore errors. Referee 'New Message' also shows manager profiles in the dropdown. Reply flow preserved with readOnly input. Notification bell badge shows '1' for referee. Zero JS crashes.

test_results.TEST_1_compose_dropdown_manager: PASS — Manager New Message opens compose form with SELECT dropdown (not readOnly input). data-testid='messages-compose-recipient-select' present.
test_results.TEST_2_dropdown_populated_referees: PASS — Dropdown has 3 referee options: ['Demo Referee', 'Jordan Ellis', 'Olivia Brooks']. Populated from referees array via recipientOptions useMemo.
test_results.TEST_3_fill_subject_body: PASS — Subject and body inputs fillable and working.
test_results.TEST_4_manager_send_success: PASS — Manager selects Demo Referee, fills subject/body, clicks Send Message. Toast: 'Message Sent! ✉️ Your message has been sent successfully.' Compose form closes. No Firestore 'undefined recipient_id' error.
test_results.TEST_5_sent_message_in_inbox: PASS — Sent message 'TEST - Game Assignment Reminder' appears in inbox list immediately after send.
test_results.TEST_6_reply_flow: PASS — Reply mode shows readOnly input (not dropdown) with correct recipient name. Subject prefixed with 'Re:'. data-testid='messages-compose-recipient-input' shown.
test_results.TEST_7_referee_dropdown_managers: PASS — Referee New Message compose form shows manager profiles dropdown: ['Demo Manager', 'Sarah Chen', 'Thomas Washington']. Populated from managerProfiles.
test_results.TEST_8_notification_bell_badge: PASS — Bell badge shows '1' in TopBar for referee (absolute-positioned badge DIV with text '1').
test_results.TEST_9_referee_send_success: PASS — Referee sends message to Demo Manager. Toast: 'Message Sent! ✉️'. Compose form closes. Inbox shows 4 messages.
test_results.TEST_10_no_js_crashes: PASS — Zero JS page errors and zero console errors across all manager and referee message flows.

critical_code_review_comments: INFO: openNewCompose() and handleForward() now correctly default to first recipientOptions entry instead of null — fix is solid.
INFO: null-recipient guard in handleSendMessage() (lines 91-93) correctly blocks sends with toast 'No recipient'. Defensive and correct.
INFO: recipientOptions useMemo correctly bifurcates: manager → referees, referee → managerProfiles.
MINOR: In handleForward() description text (line 228) still says 'Forwarding to League Manager' hardcoded — could be updated to use `newRecipientName` dynamically for accuracy, but non-blocking.
seed_data_creation: No re-seeding required. Test messages created during testing (TEST - Game Assignment Reminder, Referee TEST - Availability Update) are live in Firestore.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All message flows are working. The undefined recipient_id bug is fully resolved. The compose form now shows a native HTML <select> dropdown populated from recipientOptions (referees for manager, managerProfiles for referee). Reply mode still uses readOnly input from selectedMessage.sender_id. Bell badge and notification panel from previous iterations continue to work correctly. Minor cosmetic note: handleForward description text still hardcodes 'League Manager' instead of using newRecipientName.
